title: Enhanced Weaponry
description: Replaces minecraft tools textures with better ones
body:
Enhanced Weaponry replaces minecraft's old tool textures for new ones.

# **_[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) is now a requirement!_**

## newer versions will need [CIT Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/citreforged) and  [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (optional, but it's needed if you want the custom shield textures)
custom shield names:
- Diamond shield
- Iron shield
- Netherite shield
-----
## **Player w/ new armor & tool texture:**

![display of netherite sword and armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1f1381acb76691c4a6ed31536b8c3c739e3d38.png)
-----
